benefit_score.limitations: benefit scores compose shadow signals; they measure SIGNAL PRESENCE/STRENGTH, not proven RCA improvement, which requires labeled ground truth

adaptive.limitations: composed benefit weight; not an RCA-accuracy measurement

causal.limitations: composed benefit weight; not an RCA-accuracy measurement

decision.limitations: composed benefit weight; not an RCA-accuracy measurement

hypothesis.limitations: composed benefit weight; not an RCA-accuracy measurement

validation.limitations: composed benefit weight; not an RCA-accuracy measurement

promotion.measurement_plan: run the shadow pilot to a powered labeled corpus
promotion.reason: RCA-benefit verdict is INCONCLUSIVE on 3 labeled outcomes; the gate philosophy forbids granting runtime authority without measured, powered benefit evidence
promotion.risk: granting authority now would ship unproven behaviour

adaptive.reason: corpus n=3 too small to judge retirement

causal.reason: corpus n=3 too small to judge retirement

decision.reason: corpus n=3 too small to judge retirement

hypothesis.reason: corpus n=3 too small to judge retirement

validation.reason: corpus n=3 too small to judge retirement

scientific_verdict.limitations: shadow stack is non-authoritative; a positive verdict bounds POTENTIAL benefit if promoted, not realized benefit today
scientific_verdict.reason: only 3 labeled outcomes (< 30 power floor); RCA-benefit direction is NOT_MEASURED
scientific_verdict.required_additional_evidence: 27 more labeled outcomes; a held-out, leakage-free corpus; per-class n>=20
